fva._comment_opt_ratio: Fraction of optimal biomass to constrain during FVA (0.9 = 90% of optimal)
fva._comment_workers: Set to null for auto-detection (uses all CPU cores)
fva._comment_chunk_size: Number of reactions per task. null = auto-calculate. Larger = less overhead but less load balancing

simulated_annealing._comment_aggressive: AGGRESSIVE SETTINGS - larger perturbations and longer search
simulated_annealing._comment_temperature: High starting temp (100) for large initial exploration
simulated_annealing._comment_biomass_goal: Target experimental growth rate from Crown et al. (2015) - 0.75 1/hr for E. coli on glucose M9
simulated_annealing._comment_n_top_enzymes: Tune top 500 enzymes for sufficient optimization flexibility

maintenance_sweep._comment_ngam_range: NGAM values to test (ATPM lower bound in mmol/gDW/h). Range to find optimal match to experimental 0.75 growth rate
maintenance_sweep._comment_gam_range: GAM values to test (ATP in biomass, mmol/gDW). 75.55 is the original iML1515 value
